name: teamwork-task
description: Fetch Teamwork.com tasklist/task by URL, implement each task in the current repo, commit per task using TYPE(scope): Message convention, and log time back to Teamwork. Pulls task attachments and comments, scans the local working tree for unattached specs/samples (e.g. `Strečnianska/DNR.docx`), pauses with a question when a task explicitly says it needs an external input that is not yet available, auto-moves the task across the board (In progress → Internal testing), gates risky commits for review, and writes sequential time logs that pick up where your last Teamwork timelog ended. When the companion `teamwork-task-test` plugin is installed, auto-invokes it at the end of the run so each task's acceptance criteria get individually verified before push.
